bullets.text: Shipped features end to end across checkout, cart, and browse pages serving 200M+ annual sessions, iterating quickly based on product and design feedback
Ran A/B experiments on checkout loyalty enrollment modals, contributing to a +220% Membership Attach Rate lift projected to generate $2.2M in annual GRS
Drove migration of a high-traffic checkout page from a legacy monolith to a federated GraphQL and Java architecture
Decoupled CMS preview from checkout contract creation, cutting modal load time from 3.8s to 0.5s
Designed a server-side API integration within a day of a rate limit issue at major sale launch, preventing customer impact
Configured Datadog dashboards, alerts, and synthetics to monitor checkout errors, payment failures, and page latency
Co-founded and led engineering from zero to one for a mentorship marketplace, growing to 60+ mentors and validating the concept through direct customer feedback
Owned product execution across onboarding, scheduling, and mentor discovery workflows, prioritizing high-leverage improvements from user conversations
Built a custom scheduling system, saving the business $900/month in costs

Worked directly with university researchers to manage the full product lifecycle for a suite of full-stack applications — from requirements gathering and rapid iteration based on weekly demos to final deployment
Selected as one of only two students to receive the 2023 Hariri Student Excellence Award for exceptional skill, strong work ethic, and commitment to excellence
Built an excel editor inside Julius AI's Data Explorer, enabling users to open, edit, and save .xlsx files directly within the product
Integrated SpreadJS for in-browser sheet rendering with backend changes to persist edits to the user's spreadsheet
Streamed agent-generated cell operations into the spreadsheet in real time as Julius AI planned and executed steps
Shipped to dev environment behind a feature flag within three days
Built an open-source extension for pi, an agent harness, that detects fenced code blocks and presents a numbered picker to copy them cleanly
